titleStmt.title: SII 19.297: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 297. (A.R. No. 690 of 1904.) TIRUPPĀṞKAḌAI, WALAJAPET TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, KHARAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is dated on the 120th day which is called koṭṭa-nāḷ (day of triumpth) in the 12th year of the king, the significance of which is not clear. It records an endowment of 50 kaḻañju of gold of 9(1/2) māṟi in fineness, made by Śembiyaṉ Iḷaṅgōvēḷār Pūdi (Bhūti) Ādittar to provide for the daily supply of a nāḻi of rice for offerings and an uḻakku of oil for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tirukkarapurattu-Perumānaḍigaḷ at Kāvadippākkam alias Amaninārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Paḍuvūr- kōṭṭam. The Mahā-sabhā of the village which received this amount deputed their Annual Tank-supervision Committee and the headman of the Śiṟṟūṛ (?) for the year respectively to make the supply. Other committees of the assembly are also mentioned incidentally, like the Kuḍumbuvāriyam, Tōṭṭa-vāriyam, Kaḻani-vāriyam the Bhaṭṭas and others. The donor is evidently identical with the Koḍumbāḷūr chief Ādityavarman son of Bhūti Vikramakēsari. (M.E.R. for 1908, Part II, para. 85). This seems to be assignable to Parāntaka I.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakesaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu koṭṭanāḷ nūṟṟirupatu paṭuvūrkkoṭṭattu kkāvatippākkamākiya Amaṉinārāyaṇaccaturvvetimaṅkalattu Iv vāṭṭai kuṭumpuvāriyapperumakkaḷun toṭṭavāriyapperumakkaḷum kaḻaṉivāriyap perumakkaḷum bhaṭṭarkaḷum viśiṣṭarkaḷum Uḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaiyār paṇiyāl Ivvāṭṭai Erivāriyapperumakkaḷom cempiyaṉ Iḷaṅkoveḷār pūti Ātittarpakkal Oṉpatarai māṟi Aympatiṉ
Oṭa nāyaṉmarkkiṭuvataṟkku mutalākak koṇṭu Ivvaiympatiṉkaḻañcu poṉṉālum van=ta vṛtthiyāley Iccempiyaṉ Iḷaṅkoṭuveḷār pūti Ātittar vaitta dhanmamāka Emmur trikkara purattup perumāṉaṭikaḷukku nicati Oru nāḻi tiruvamurtum nicati Oru nantāviḷakkukku nicati Uḻakkeṇṇaiyum Ācantrakālamum muṭṭāme kuṭuppippomākavum Ittiruvamirtu Avvāṭṭai Erivāriyapperumakkaḷe muṭṭāme kuṭuppārākavum Innan=taviḷakkukku Avvavāṇṭu ciṟṟūrāṭcikoḷvāṉaiye koṇṭu nicati luṅ koḷḷappiṟātā
kavum ciṟṟūrāṭci kuṭuppārum Ivvuḻakkeṇṇai Uḷḷākavaṉṟi kuṭukkappiṟātārākavum Idhanmam Ācantrakālame muṭṭāme Avvav vāṭṭai Erivārikapperumakkaḷe kaṭaikkaṇṭu kuṭuppippārākavum Idhanmam rakṣittār Aśvamedhañ ceyta phalam peṟuvārākavum Idhanmattukku virodham ceytār gaṅgaiyiṭai
Digital edition of SII 19.297 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
